products.title: Fresh Produce, Frozen Foods & Prepared Food Solutions
products.description: Explore our main product categories, including fresh vegetables, fresh fruits, frozen foods and prepared foods for global buyers.

gallery.swipeHint: Swipe left or right to view more images

fresh-vegetables.name: Fresh Vegetables
fresh-vegetables.description: Fresh ginger, garlic, onion, potato, carrot, taro, yam, bell pepper and other fresh vegetables.

fresh-fruits.name: Fresh Fruits
fresh-fruits.description: Apples, pears, peaches, grapes, blueberries and other seasonal fresh fruits.

frozen-foods.name: Frozen Foods
frozen-foods.description: Frozen ginger products, garlic products, vegetables, fruits and food ingredients.

prepared-foods.name: Prepared Foods
prepared-foods.description: Ready-to-cook products, prepared vegetables and customized food solutions.

fresh-ginger.name: Fresh Ginger
fresh-ginger.description: Fresh ginger sourced from carefully managed planting bases in China, with export-ready packing, quality inspection and cold-chain coordination for international buyers.
fresh-ginger.details: Fresh ginger is one of SanHe's core export products. We support importers, wholesalers, supermarkets and food manufacturers with coordinated sourcing, sorting, cleaning, grading, packaging and export services. Flexible specifications and customized packaging are available according to destination-market requirements.
fresh-ginger.packaging: 10kg / 13.6kg carton, mesh bag or customized export packaging
fresh-ginger.supplyAbility: Stable supply supported by seasonal production, storage and sourcing coordination
fresh-ginger.loadingCapacity: According to packaging specification and container type

packaging.title: Available Packaging Options
packaging.description: Flexible packaging solutions are available to meet different market requirements and customer preferences.

advantages.title: Why Buyers Choose SanHe
advantages.description: SanHe supports international buyers with coordinated sourcing, controlled processing, flexible packaging and professional export service.

freshFromSource.title: Carefully Managed Sourcing
freshFromSource.description: Products are selected through carefully managed planting and sourcing channels.

stableSupply.title: Coordinated Stable Supply
stableSupply.description: Seasonal production, storage and sourcing coordination support continuous export supply.

factoryProcessing.title: Controlled Processing
factoryProcessing.description: Cleaning, grading and packing are coordinated under controlled processing standards.

coldChain.title: Storage & Cold Chain
coldChain.description: Storage and cold-chain coordination help maintain product condition before shipment.

customizedPackaging.title: Flexible Packaging
customizedPackaging.description: OEM, private-label and market-specific packaging solutions are available.

globalExport.title: Professional Export Support
globalExport.description: Export coordination supports importers, wholesalers and food businesses in global markets.

supplyCapability.title: Reliable Supply for Global Buyers
supplyCapability.description: SanHe integrates planting, processing, cold chain warehousing and export service to support stable international supply.

applications.title: Suitable for Different Buyer Needs
applications.description: This product is suitable for importers, wholesalers, supermarkets, food manufacturers and food service companies.

qualityAssurance.title: Quality Controls That Support Reliable Supply
qualityAssurance.description: SanHe coordinates inspection, food-safety management, traceability and storage conditions to reduce purchasing risk for international buyers.

inspection.title: Quality Inspection
inspection.description: Product condition, appearance, grading and packaging are checked before shipment.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety Management
foodSafety.description: Handling and processing are coordinated according to applicable food-safety requirements.

traceability.title: Full Traceability
traceability.description: Supply, processing and shipment information can be recorded to support product traceability.

coldChain.title: Storage & Cold Chain
coldChain.description: Storage and cold-chain coordination help maintain product condition before export delivery.

relatedProducts.title: You May Also Be Interested In
relatedProducts.description: Explore more products from the same category.
